name: Mocha Chip Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Instant coffee dissolved in water
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray muffin cups with vegetable cooking spray.
2. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. Combine milk, oil, applesauce, egg substitute and coffee mixture in a medium bowl.
4. In a large bowl, combine remaining ingredients.
5. Add wet ingredients to dry, mixing until combined.
6. Fill muffin cups 1/2 to 3/4 full.
7. Bake for 30-40 minutes, until tester inserted into center comes clean.
